hook.say: Tom Hanks' new movie just landed a surprise summer release.
hook.show: Tom Hanks' new movie just landed a surprise summer release.

lines.say: Hanks reunites with director Marielle Heller, who guided his Oscar nomination for "A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood."
lines.show: Hanks reunites with director Marielle Heller, who guided his Oscar nomination for "A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood."

lines.show: The cast includes Callum Turner, Bad Bunny, and Colman Domingo.

lines.say: It faces direct competition from "A Quiet Place III."
lines.show: It faces direct competition from "A Quiet Place III."

captions.instagram:
Tom Hanks is back in a big way! His new baseball drama, "The Comebacker," just locked in a prime summer 2027 release date.⚾️ Directed by Marielle Heller and featuring a star-studded cast, this film is set to be a major player. Get the full scoop.

#TomHanks #TheComebacker #MarielleHeller #SonyPictures #MovieNews #SummerMovies #Hollywood #FilmRelease #ScreenReport #AQuietPlace3
captions.facebook: Big news for Tom Hanks fans! His new movie, "The Comebacker," is hitting theaters in summer 2027. It's a reunion with Oscar-nominated director Marielle Heller. Ready for some baseball drama?

pinterest.title: Tom Hanks' "The Comebacker" Lands Big Summer 2027 Release Date
pinterest.description: Get ready for Tom Hanks' new movie, "The Comebacker," directed by Marielle Heller and co-starring Bad Bunny and Colman Domingo. Sony has slated this baseball drama for a prime summer 2027 release, competing directly with "A Quiet Place III." Discover all the details on this highly anticipated film.

youtube.title: Tom Hanks' New Baseball Movie Gets Major Summer 2027 Release #Shorts
youtube.description: Tom Hanks' latest movie, "The Comebacker," is set for a big summer 2027 release. Directed by Marielle Heller, this baseball drama features a stellar cast.

captions.x: Tom Hanks' new film "The Comebacker" hits theaters July 30, 2027! It's a reunion with director Marielle Heller and faces off against "A Quiet Place III." #TomHanks #TheComebacker

spoken: Tom Hanks' new movie just landed a surprise summer release. Sony greenlit "The Comebacker" for July 30, 2027. Hanks reunites with director Marielle Heller, who guided his Oscar nomination for "A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood." He stars as a sportswriter covering a major league team. The cast includes Callum Turner, Bad Bunny, and Colman Domingo. It faces direct competition from "A Quiet Place III." This summer slot positions it for blockbuster success. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
